mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_session (id, conversation_id, created_at, last_active_at, ip, user_agent, message_count) VALUES (#{id}, #{conversationId}, #{createdAt}, #{lastActiveAt}, #{ip}, #{userAgent}, #{messageCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_chat_session SET last_active_at = #{lastActiveAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ai_chat_session SET message_count = message_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, conversation_id AS conversationId, created_at AS createdAt, last_active_at AS lastActiveAt, ip, user_agent AS userAgent, message_count AS messageCount FROM ai_chat_session WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
